title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Images Security Update
overview: New images are available for Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 and Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Operator, running on OpenShift Container Platform
description: New images are available for Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 and Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Operator, running on OpenShift Container Platform
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Images Security Update

New images are available for Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 and Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Operator, running on OpenShift Container Platform

New images are available for Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 and Red Hat build of Keycloak 26.4.6 Operator, running on OpenShift Container Platform



CVE-2025-13467: A flaw was found in the Keycloak LDAP User Federation provider. This vulnerability allows an authenticated realm administrator to trigger deserialization of untrusted Java objects via a malicious LDAP server configuration.
